moments.title: Wimbledon Quarter-Finals Day
moments.blurb: The Gentlemen's Singles Quarter-finals are taking place today at Wimbledon, as the tournament enters its final week of action.

angles.name: Centre Court Drama
angles.copy: It's Quarter-Finals day at Wimbledon! Who are you backing to make it through to the semis at SW19?

angles.name: London Calling
angles.copy: The biggest names in tennis are battling it out on Centre Court right now for a spot in the Wimbledon semi-finals. The atmosphere in London is electric!

moments.title: Tour de France Stage 4
moments.blurb: The 113th Tour de France continues today with Stage 4, a hilly 181.9km ride from Carcassonne to Foix in the Pyrenees.

angles.name: Mountain Challenge
angles.copy: The peloton is tackling the hilly Stage 4 of the Tour de France today! Who's going to conquer the Pyrenees and take the yellow jersey?

angles.name: Cycling Buzz
angles.copy: It's another day of gruelling climbs and thrilling descents at the Tour de France. Catch all the action from Stage 4 right now!

moments.title: Lily Allen Live at The O2
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Lily Allen is performing live tonight at The O2 Arena in London.

angles.name: Tonight's Show
angles.copy: Lily Allen takes to the stage at The O2 tonight! Who's heading to Greenwich for some pop perfection?

angles.name: London's Calling
angles.copy: It's a big night for London music fans as Lily Allen plays The O2! Expect hits, sass, and an unforgettable show.

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean make chart history
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' holds the UK Number 1 spot for a 15th non-consecutive week, equalling records for chart longevity.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: 15 weeks at Number 1! Sam Fender and Olivia Dean are making Official Charts history with 'Rein Me In'. What a track!

angles.name: New Chart Entrants
angles.copy: Madonna's 'Danceteria' is set to be the highest new entry in the UK singles chart this week. Can she challenge the top spot?

moments.title: Rapid Endometriosis Tests on NHS
moments.blurb: Rapid endometriosis tests are set to be made available on the NHS in England and Wales, hailed as a 'gamechanger' for millions of women.

angles.name: Health News
angles.copy: Big news for women's health: rapid endometriosis tests are coming to the NHS in England and Wales. A real step forward!

angles.name: Wales Health
angles.copy: Game-changing news for women across Wales! Rapid endometriosis tests are being rolled out on the NHS, offering quicker diagnosis and support.

moments.title: Goodwood Festival of Speed
moments.blurb: The Goodwood Festival of Speed, a celebration of motorsport and car culture, kicks off this Thursday, July 9th, running until July 12th.

angles.name: Engines Ready
angles.copy: Get ready for speed! The Goodwood Festival of Speed starts this Thursday. What car are you most excited to see on the hill climb?

angles.name: Petrolheads Unite
angles.copy: The South is gearing up for the Goodwood Festival of Speed this week! Four days of incredible cars, bikes, and motorsport legends. Who's going?

moments.title: New TV Shows for July
moments.blurb: Several new TV series have premiered this July, including 'Elle' on Prime Video, 'Fire Country' Season 4 on Sky Witness, and 'Suits: LA' on Channel 4.

angles.name: Box Set Binge
angles.copy: New month, new shows! 'Elle', 'Fire Country S4', and 'Suits: LA' all dropped this July. What's top of your watch list?

angles.name: Weekend Watchlist
angles.copy: Looking for something new to stream? July brought us 'Ann Droid' on BBC, and 'The Dark' on ITV. Get stuck in!

moments.title: Exeter Fatal Collision Appeal
moments.blurb: Police are appealing for witnesses and dash-cam footage following a fatal collision involving a motorcycle and a van in Exeter on Sunday, July 5th.

angles.name: Local Appeal
angles.copy: Our thoughts are with those affected by Sunday's fatal collision in Exeter. Police are urging anyone with information or dash-cam footage to come forward. Quote log 622 of 5 July 2026.

angles.name: Community Safety
angles.copy: Important appeal from Devon & Cornwall Police regarding Sunday's fatal collision on Pennsylvania Road. If you saw anything, please contact them.

moments.title: Welsh Pylon Firm Rebuked by High Court
moments.blurb: A High Court judge has criticised energy firm Green GEN Cymru over its 'discourteous' treatment of Welsh farmers regarding land access for pylon construction.

angles.name: Rural Wales
angles.copy: Welsh farmers have won a significant High Court ruling against Green GEN Cymru over their treatment regarding pylon plans. A victory for rural communities!

angles.name: Local Impact
angles.copy: Huge news for landowners across Wales. The High Court has sided with farmers against Green GEN Cymru's approach to pylon development. What are your thoughts?

moments.title: UK Maritime Emissions Scheme Now Active
moments.blurb: The UK Emission Trading Scheme for Maritime, aimed at reducing greenhouse gas emissions in shipping, became effective on July 1, 2026.

angles.name: Green Shipping
angles.copy: The UK's new Emission Trading Scheme for Maritime is now in force, targeting greenhouse gas reductions in domestic shipping. A step towards Net Zero!

angles.name: Environmental Policy
angles.copy: As of July 1st, the UK Maritime ETS is active. What impact do you think this will have on the shipping industry and the environment?

moments.title: Super Furry Animals London Gig
moments.blurb: Welsh alt-rock legends Super Furry Animals are playing Alexandra Palace Park in London this Sunday, July 12th, with support from The Beta Band and Badly Drawn Boy.

angles.name: Indie Icons
angles.copy: Super Furry Animals are bringing their unique sound to Alexandra Palace Park this Sunday! Who's excited to see the Welsh icons?

angles.name: Welsh Legends
angles.copy: From Cardiff to Ally Pally! Super Furry Animals are playing London this weekend. A must-see for any SFA fan!

moments.title: System of a Down Hit London
moments.blurb: System of a Down return to the UK next week, playing two nights at London's Tottenham Hotspur Stadium on July 13th and 15th.

angles.name: Metal Mayhem
angles.copy: System of a Down are back in London next week for two huge shows! Expect a mosh pit frenzy at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium.

angles.name: Rock Week Ahead
angles.copy: Who's ready for System of a Down? They're tearing up London next week! Get your tickets if you haven't already!

moments.title: Wales Aims for Cycling Tourism Boost
moments.blurb: First Minister Rhun ap Iorwerth has announced ambitions for Wales to become a world-leading cycling tourism destination, with a Tour de France stage planned for 2027.

angles.name: Cycling Future
angles.copy: Wales is looking to become a global cycling hotspot, with plans for a Tour de France stage in 2027! Great news for Welsh tourism and sport.

angles.name: Local Impact
angles.copy: Imagine the Tour de France coming to Wales! The First Minister has big plans for cycling tourism across the country. How would this benefit Pembrokeshire?

moments.title: Ceredigion Active Travel Consultation
moments.blurb: Ceredigion County Council is seeking public input until September 25th on its future Active Travel Network Map, aiming to improve walking, wheeling, and cycling routes.

angles.name: Local Consultation
angles.copy: Have your say on Ceredigion's future! The council wants your views on making walking, cycling, and wheeling routes safer and more accessible.

angles.name: Community Feedback
angles.copy: If you live, work or cycle in Ceredigion, this is your chance to help shape the Active Travel Network. Share your thoughts before September 25th!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Rachel Stevens
moments.blurb: Rachel Stevens, singer from S Club 7, turns 48 on July 9th. She was born in 1978.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Happy 48th Birthday to the incredible Rachel Stevens! From S Club 7 to solo stardom, what's your favourite Rachel track?

angles.name: S Club Memories
angles.copy: It's Rachel Stevens' birthday on Thursday! Getting us in the mood with some classic S Club 7. Don't stop movin'!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ricky Martin
moments.blurb: Puerto Rican superstar Ricky Martin, famous for hits like 'Livin' la Vida Loca', turns 55 on July 11th. He was born in 1971.

angles.name: Latin Pop King
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday this Sunday to the one and only Ricky Martin! Get ready to 'Livin' la Vida Loca' all weekend long.

angles.name: Weekend Vibes
angles.copy: It's Ricky Martin's birthday this weekend! What's your favourite track from the Latin pop icon to get the party started?

moments.title: Happy Birthday George Clinton
moments.blurb: Funk music legend George Clinton, leader of Parliament-Funkadelic, turns 85 on July 16th. He was born in 1941.

angles.name: Funk Master
angles.copy: Happy 85th Birthday to the Godfather of Funk, George Clinton, this Thursday! Get down to some Parliament-Funkadelic to celebrate.

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible George Clinton's 85th birthday next week! His influence on music is immeasurable. What's your favourite P-Funk track?
